title: Create PR for iteration 1.1
description:
## Objective
Branch + commit + PR for the iteration's work.

## Implementation
1. Create feature branch from course-main: git checkout -b 2026-05-21-iter-1.1-seeder-scaffold
2. Stage the changes: git add package.json package-lock.json scripts/seed-supabase.ts Makefile
3. Commit with a clear message (NEW commit, not amend)
4. Push with -u origin
5. gh pr create targeting course-main with title 'iter-1.1: Supabase seeder scaffold + make seed target' and a brief Summary + Test plan body
6. Capture the PR URL — paste it in the tk note on this task

## Tests
After pushing: gh pr checks <PR#> — wait for CI to be green
Do NOT close until CI is green.
acceptance_criteria: PR open, CI green, URL noted on this task
